block.warriorcats_events.moss_bed.toolti: A comfortable moss nest, lined with feathers, ferns, and flowers.
block.warriorcats_events.hay_bed.tooltip: A comfortable hay nest made from wheat. The wheat might itch a little.
block.warriorcats_events.kelp_bed.toolti: A nest made of kelp and seagrass. Still smells like fish.
block.warriorcats_events.stone_bed.toolt: A not so comfortable yet functional nest. A little hard, but the feathers make it slightly better.
block.warriorcats_events.lavender_bed.to: A very comfortable nest with a strong relaxing scent.
block.warriorcats_events.cherry_blossom_: A very comfortable, pretty, and colorful nest.
block.warriorcats_events.driftwood_bed.t: A nest made of driftwood, decorated with pretty seashells.
block.warriorcats_events.daisy_bed.toolt: A fragrant nest made of Daisy flowers.
block.warriorcats_events.acacia_bed.tool: A nest made of Acacia leaves, decorated with Chamomile.
A nest made of leaves and sticks, and decorated with Terracotta.
block.warriorcats_events.bamboo_bed.tool: A comfortable nest made of Bamboo and its leaves.
block.warriorcats_events.berry_bed.toolt: A comfortable and sweet nest made of Sweet Berries and leaves.
block.warriorcats_events.coral_bed.toolt: A very colorful nest made of coral. Still smells like sea salt.
block.warriorcats_events.glowberry_bed.t: A pretty glowy nest made of Glowberries and leaves.
block.warriorcats_events.muddy_bed.toolt: A nest made of mud and leaves packed together.
block.warriorcats_events.moonstone.toolt: A strange shiny rock that seems to have unusual properties.
item.warriorcats_events.dock_leaves.tool: Good for making poultices and wraping herbs
item.warriorcats_events.sorrel_leaves.to: Traveling herb. Used to ease hunger and thirst
item.warriorcats_events.dock_poultice.to: Good for scratches and sore pads.\n\nRight click: Heal a Wild Cat.
item.warriorcats_events.burnet_leaves.to: Traveling herb. Used to give strength
item.warriorcats_events.chamomile.toolti: Traveling herb. Strengthens the heart and soothes the mind
item.warriorcats_events.daisy_leaves.too: Traveling herb. Eases the pain of aching joints
item.warriorcats_events.deathberries.too: Strong scented berries. Other cats say these are deadly
A bundle of sorrel, burnet, chamomile, and daisy. Perfect for traveling
item.warriorcats_events.whiskers.tooltip: Whiskers allow you to know things about your clanmates!\n
item.warriorcats_events.warrior_name_ran: Right click: Randomize a Wild Cat's name depending on their age!
item.warriorcats_events.freshkill_and_he: Give this to a Wild Cat to recruit it! Sure they will love it.
item.warriorcats_events.claws.tooltip: Designed by nature to hunt and fight.\nThese will also help gathering plants and leaves without breaking them.\n
item.warriorcats_events.catmint.tooltip: The best remedy for greencough so far.\nVery tasty herb.\nGive this to tamed Wild Cats to make them be mates.
item.warriorcats_events.yarrow.tooltip: A not so very good tasting herb. These could make any cat vomit.
item.warriorcats_events.feverfew.tooltip: Reduces body temperature for cats with fever or chills.
item.warriorcats_events.poppy_seeds.tool: Can help a cat sleep, soothes shock or distress.
item.warriorcats_events.comfrey_leaves.t: Can be chewed into a poultice.
item.warriorcats_events.comfrey_root.too: Can be chewed into a poultice.
Good for soothing and healing sore pads.\n\nRight-Click to heal Sore Pads.
item.warriorcats_events.comfrey_poultice: Helps to heal broken bones.\n\nRight-Click to reduce the healing cooldown of a Broken Leg.
item.warriorcats_events.cobweb_on_a_stic: An ingredient for crafts such as Leg Wraps.
Give any name you like to any of your clanmates!\nFormat: '<prefix> <sufix>' or  '<name>'
item.warriorcats_events.rare_flowers_bou: If a cat truly loves you... This offer will definitely turn a friendship into something else.
item.warriorcats_events.strange_shiny_st: A rare shiny gem obtained by dropping a diamond and an emerald together at night.
item.warriorcats_events.warriors_guide.t: Every warrior needs guidance at some point!
block.warriorcats_events.stone_crafting_: A rock specially designed to craft anything with your paws!
curios.identifier.head: Head
prey_skull_item.tooltip: This could make a pretty decoration placed on some bones!
item.warriorcats_events.leg_wrap.tooltip: A stick wrapped in vines or leaves. Just enough to keep a bone steady for it to heal.
death.attack.greencough.player: %1$s has died from Greencough while fighting %2$s
death.attack.whitecough.player: %1$s has died from Whitecough while fighting %2$s
disease.warriorcats_events.greencough.de: The deadliest of coughs, usually acquired in Leaf-bare. Greencough is a severe chest infection that affects breathing and can cause death. It can be treated with Catmint.
disease.warriorcats_events.whitecough.de: Whitecough is a chest infection that doesn't usually cause death. Can be treated with Catmint or Juniper Berries. If left untreated, can evolve into the deadly Greencough.
disease.warriorcats_events.broken_leg.de: While a broken leg is not necessarily deadly, it is an injury that can make a cat too disabled to hunt for themselves. A broken leg can also cause a lot of pain and make a cat more prone to falls that could cause death. Can be treated with a Leg Wrap to keep the bone steady, and Comfrey Poultice to help the bone heal.
disease.warriorcats_events.chills.descri: A cat can get chills from the cold, fever, or even from shock. It is not a disease but more of a condition. Can be treated with Feverfew, Juniper Berries, or Poppy Seeds.
disease.warriorcats_events.deathberries_: Deathberries Poisoning is the deadliest of conditions. A cat can get poisoned from Deathberries after eating them. The poisoning is lethal unless it is thrown up, which can be caused by eating Yarrow.
disease.warriorcats_events.fever.descrip: A fever is an abnormally high temperature of the body. While it's not a disease, it can be sign of another condition. Can be treated with Feverfew.
disease.warriorcats_events.sore_pads.des: While sore pads is a condition not considered a disease, it can still be quite painful and annoying. A cat with sore pads might struggle to move, climb, or leap. It can be treated with Dock Poultice or Yarrow Poultice.
death.attack.deathberries.player: %1$s has died poisoned by Deathberries while fighting %2$s
